title: Tarot
profTagline: Draw the Rider-Waite-Smith deck for a reading — a card of the day or one of nine spreads, from a quick three-card to the crossroads, the star, the Major-Arcana Soul Pyramid and the full Celtic Cross. Each spread says plainly what it answers. Classic 1909 imagery and canonical meanings, entirely on your device and offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
descDaily: One card to set the tone of your day.
descPPF: How a situation is moving over time.
descSAO: What's happening, what to do, where it leads.
descMind: A quick check-in on your whole self.
descChoice: Two roads: what follows if you act, and what follows if you don't — then the advice.
descStar: The core of a matter and the forces around it — what helps, what holds you back, where it's heading.
descLove: The dynamic between two people and where the bond is going.
descPyramid: Six Major Arcana, base to apex — from your roots to the lesson your soul is here to learn.
descCeltic: The classic ten cards for a full, in-depth reading.
